## Checklist
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `ruff check pglu tests` passes
- [ ] Core still works with **no** third-party deps (extras imported defensively)
- [ ] Cross-platform safe (guarded with `platform.system()` where needed)
- [ ] No `eval`; no secrets committed
- [ ] Added/updated a test for the change
